findings.body: validateBenchmarkEvaluationSpend checks approval and non_recurring_routing_disposition but does not validate provider_pricing_evidence or expected_per_run_cost even though the refusal text requires them.
validateRecurringPaidRoutes checks spend_class_approval, promotion_threshold, and applies_to_stage_capability_profile but not provider_pricing_evidence or expected_cost_ceiling.
validateSoftBudgetBands uses denylisted invalid values, allowing unknown budget_mode or normal_variance_policy values to pass instead of failing closed.
validateTraceCostSignalBoundary rejects can_satisfy_required_workflow_artifacts=true but does not reject can_replace_approvals_or_landing_evidence=true.
